news.headline: Momcozy launches charity contest to support mothers during holidays, part of "Joy for All, Love for You" campaign.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, a renowned global brand for mothers and babies, Momcozy, has excitedly introduced the "Love in Action" Charity Contest during the festive period as a component of its "Joy for All, Love for You" promotion. The campaign is timed with Giving Tuesday and aims to...

news.headline: XRP price down by 4.26% in 24 hours to $2.5. Weekly trend up by 76%, from $1.38 to current.
news.summary: The price of XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) has dropped by 4.26% in the last 24 hours, settling at $2.5. This decline contrasts with its strong performance in the past week, during which it surged by 76.0% from $1.38 to its current value. A comparison chart depicting XRP's price fluctuations and volatility over the previous 24 hours can be found in the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Senior Med. Solutions partners with Integrity to support underserved communities with industry-leading resources and technology. (Characters: 111)
Safran DSI expands in US with new strategy to drive defense tech innovation, aims to strengthen manufacturing.
news.summary: The launch of a new U.S. subsidiary, Safran Defense & Space, Inc. (Safran DSI), based in Arlington, Virginia, was announced on December 3, 2024. This move aims to bolster U.S. manufacturing in support of national defense and emerging technologies. Safran, a major aerospace player, seeks to drive innovation with this initiative. The establishment of Safran DSI signifies a significant investment in the U.S. economy and is expected to create jobs. This strategic venture underscores the company's commitment to advancing defense capabilities and technological advancements in the U.S.

news.headline: OFC 2025 Plenary to showcase photonics, optical comms, AI innovations with Prof. Kei May Lau, Dr. Bryan S. Robinson, and Dr. Pradeep Sindhu, highlighting key trends in networking at 50th-anniversary conference.
news.summary: Top experts from the industry will discuss the leading trends influencing the future of optical networking at the 50th-anniversary conference of OFC in San Francisco on December 3, 2024. OFC, renowned as the primary worldwide gathering for optical networking, will host this event.

news.headline: Beamery appoints Erinn Tarpey as first CMO to boost B2B HR software visibility and usage. London, Dec 3, 2024.
news.summary: A seasoned B2B HR software expert has been chosen to enhance recognition, benefits, and utilization of the solution among worldwide corporations. The announcement was made in London on December 3, 2024. Beamery, known for its AI-powered platform facilitating improved talent choices by centralizing skills data and intelligence, aims to increase its presence among enterprises globally.

news.headline: The Community Solution Education System appoints Dr. Cherron R. Hoppes as new Chief Academic Officer on November 4, 2024.
news.summary: In Chicago on December 3, 2024, the Community Solution Education System shared the news of Dr. Cherron R. Hoppes' appointment as the new Chief Academic Officer (CAO) starting from November 4, 2024. Dr. Hoppes, with a wealth of experience in strategic academic leadership, will take on this important role within the organization, demonstrating a strong commitment to advancing educational initiatives.

news.headline: Wines of Georgia sees success with 2024 campaign in the US. Engaged trade, media, and consumers to grow Georgian wine category.
news.summary: In December 2024, the 2024 campaign took action in the top export market to promote growth for the Georgian wine category. Through a series of events, trade, media, and consumers were engaged to educate and support the industry. Wines of Georgia, the organization advocating for Georgian wines and wineries, spearheaded this effort in New York.

news.headline: Cetera Financial Group partners with First Citizens State Bank, a Wisconsin-based bank with 161-year history.
news.summary: Today, a bank headquartered in Wisconsin with a history spanning 161 years has formed a partnership with Cetera Financial Institutions, a division of LPL Financial. Cetera Financial Group, a leading financial advisor Wealth Hub, revealed this news. The bank mentioned, First Citizens State Bank, has officially joined forces with Cetera Financial Institutions.

news.headline: Chrysler Pacifica partners with The Elf on the Shelf for holiday campaign, featuring on social media until Christmas Eve.
news.summary: In Auburn Hills, Michigan on December 3, 2024, Chrysler Pacifica has been announced as the official minivan for the holiday season. Teaming up with The Elf on the Shelf, they aim to spread Christmas magic. The holiday campaign will be active through Christmas Eve and will be featured across Chrysler brand's social media platforms including Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok.

news.headline: Nursing Economic$ Foundation giving $5,000 scholarships to 4 RNs in master's/doctoral programs. Applications open.
news.summary: PITMAN, New Jersey - The Nursing Economic$ Foundation recently disclosed the commencement of the application process for its yearly scholarship initiative. They are offering up to four scholarships worth $5,000 each to registered nurses who are pursuing master's or doctoral degrees in nursing programs.

news.headline: Edgewater Midstream acquires Shell's Sinco Pipeline and Colex East & West Terminals in Houston. #EnergyAcquisition
news.summary: In Houston, Edgewater Midstream LLC, backed by EnCap Flatrock Midstream, has successfully finalized the acquisition of the Sinco Pipeline system, along with the Colex East and Colex West Terminals situated in the Houston refining corridor, from select Shell USA, Inc. subsidiaries. The acquired assets notably encompass the Sinco Pipeline system, which features a network of intrastate refined products pipelines linking the Deer Park Refinery Complex. This strategic business move underlines the significant investment and operational scope as Edgewater expands its energy portfolio in the region.

news.headline: Greystar announces Birchway Sherman is now accepting move-ins; promises elevated rental experience in Sherman.
news.summary: A modern rental community is being introduced in Sherman, Texas, by Greystar, a prominent player in real estate investment, development, and management worldwide. This new development is set to bring a sophisticated living experience to the area. The community is expected to offer a high-quality rental experience, with state-of-the-art amenities and services. This initiative reflects Greystar's commitment to enhancing the rental housing market in Sherman. Stay tuned for further updates on this exciting project.

news.headline: Leopard Solutions wins "Predictive Analytics Solution of the Year" award for its "Probability of Move" data in LegalTech Breakthrough, 2024.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Leopard Solutions, a SurePoint® company, was awarded the prestigious title of "Predictive Analytics Solution of the Year" in the LegalTech awards. Their groundbreaking "Probability of Move" data, known for its innovation and predictive accuracy, received this recognition. This marks the 5th annual edition of the awards, highlighting the increasing value and impact of predictive analytics in the legal industry. This accolade showcases the significance of Leopard Solutions' analytics offering, reaffirming its position as a leader in the field.

news.headline: Gen X investors aged 44-59 are financially struggling due to supporting family, with 30% having less than $100,000 in retirement savings.
news.summary: Increased inflation rates are leading to delays in retirement plans for many individuals, with 30% of people having saved less than $100,000 for their retirement. Specifically, in Columbus, Ohio, on December 3, 2024, Generation X investors aged 44-59 find themselves in a challenging financial situation as they navigate between bigger generations.

news.headline: Sharp introduces XP-A201U-B, its brightest LCD projector, featuring unique laser system for vivid colors. Announced by SIICA division of Sharp Electronics Corporation, with launch date set on Dec 3, 2024.
news.summary: Sharp Imaging and Information Company of America, a division of Sharp Electronics Corporation, unveiled the XP-A201U-B on December 3, 2024, in Montvale, New Jersey. This cutting-edge device is equipped with a state-of-the-art laser system, providing vibrant colors and versatile installation options.

news.headline: Isle Blue introduces VIP Villa Collection with luxurious private islands for elite travelers.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, in Charlotte, North Carolina, Isle Blue introduced its VIP Villa Collection, catering to the increasing trend of private travel among affluent individuals. The collection includes top-tier accommodations like Richard Branson's sought-after Moskito Island, among others. This curated selection showcases the most lavish villas and private islands globally, appealing to the world's elite travelers.

news.headline: Sol de Janeiro presents "Jardim Sol de Janeiro: A Garden for the Senses" at Art Basel Miami Beach 2024, highlighting Brazilian art and Cheirosa perfume mists.
news.summary: A celebration of Brazilian art and Cheirosa perfume mists is taking place in New York at "Jardim Sol de Janeiro: A Garden for the Senses" by Sol de Janeiro. The beauty brand, known for embodying Brazilian culture, is hosting the event at Art Basel Miami in December 3, 2024. The exhibition showcases a unique blend of art and fragrances, reflecting the warmth and self-expression of Brazil. The event highlights sol de Janeiro's commitment to promoting Brazilian art and culture to a broader audience.

news.headline: Baesman and Listrak partner to offer Listrak's email and SMS services to clients. Dec 3, 2024.
news.summary: A collaboration between Baesman, a prominent retail marketing leader, and Listrak, a top provider of cross-channel marketing automation for retailers, was unveiled on December 3, 2024 in Lititz, Pennsylvania. The partnership aims to introduce Listrak's highly-regarded email and SMS services to Baesman, enhancing their marketing capabilities.

news.headline: TransPerfect Legal wins in 3 categories at Canadian Lawyer's 2024 Readers' Choice Awards for eDiscovery, Translation, and Managed Review.
news.summary: A prominent legal technology provider has received recognition for its excellence in eDiscovery, translation services, and managed review. TransPerfect Legal, a global leader in legal technology and advisory services, announced its achievement of accolades in three categories in Canada. The company, based in Toronto and New York, was acknowledged for its outstanding performance in these areas on December 3, 2024.

news.headline: Altar.io and Dr. Rumman Chowdhury partner to develop Ethical AI Feedback System, promoting responsible AI.
news.summary: In Lisbon, Portugal on December 3, 2024, a notable technology consulting firm, Altar.io, revealed its collaboration with Dr. Rumman Chowdhury, a renowned expert in AI ethics. This partnership marks a significant step towards advocating for ethical AI practices worldwide. Altar.io, known for its innovative approach, is at the forefront of promoting responsible AI.

news.headline: Enhancing quality control in manufacturing crucial; a minor oversight can have significant repercussions.
news.summary: In Brea, California, on December 3, 2024, it was emphasized that quality control is crucial in intricate manufacturing processes, with a slight error having potential for serious consequences. The importance of preventing faulty components from reaching customers was highlighted, as a product failure during use could result in significant financial implications.

news.headline: GA Telesis contracted with CommuteAir for Embraer landing gear repair and overhaul, marking a significant partnership.
news.summary: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida on December 3, 2024, GA Telesis, LLC, a prominent provider of aviation services worldwide, has confirmed a new deal with CommuteAir, a United Express airline. The agreement involves the maintenance and refurbishment of Embraer landing gear systems. This contract spans multiple years and signifies a significant collaboration between the two companies in the aviation industry.

news.headline: Elation reveals REBEL Profile at LDI 2024 - innovative LED profile sets new standard in entertainment lighting.
news.summary: Introducing the REBEL Profile at the LDI 2024 event in Las Vegas, Elation showcases a new standard in high-performance and versatile lighting solutions for upcoming creative needs. This innovative product, a compact LED profile, is designed to meet the demands of the industry with its powerful features. Elation, known for its expertise in professional entertainment lighting technology, aims to revolutionize the market with this new release. The REBEL Profile promises to provide users with exceptional performance and flexibility to tackle tomorrow's challenges effectively.

news.headline: Deck the Vault, a Christmas-themed pop-up bar at The Vault in Cleveland's The Metropolitan at The 9, offers festive celebrations.
news.summary: In Cleveland on December 3, 2024, The Vault at The Metropolitan at The 9, renowned for its speakeasy ambiance, has undergone a festive makeover to become Deck the Vault, a unique Christmas pop-up bar. This winter wonderland experience is exclusive to Cleveland, offering a one-of-a-kind holiday celebration. Positioned within The Metropolitan at The 9, visitors can now enjoy the transformed bar's holiday-themed decor and menu offerings.

news.headline: AES NYC is at the forefront of multi-functional venues trend in NYC, offering innovative spaces since 2010.
news.summary: In New York City, AES NYC is at the forefront of meeting the increasing demand for versatile event spaces. Established in 2010, AES NYC has significantly transformed venue management by offering innovative and flexible options. This shift comes in response to the escalating need for adaptable event spaces in the city.

news.headline: SynFutures launches foundation & F token, empowering community governance. HONG KONG, Dec. 3, 2024 /PRNewswire - www.synfutures.com.
news.summary: SynFutures has taken a significant step towards decentralization with the introduction of the SynFutures Foundation and F token. This move allows the community to have a more active role in governing the protocol. The development was announced in Hong Kong on December 3, 2024. SynFutures, a prominent decentralized exchange platform facilitating leveraged trading for various assets, has been making strides towards empowering its users with more control over the platform. This initiative marks a crucial milestone for SynFutures as it moves towards a more community-based governance model.

news.headline: GHX is now accepting nominations for the 2024 GHXcellence Awards, honoring healthcare organizations and individuals.
news.summary: Each year, outstanding organizations and individuals pushing the healthcare industry forward are recognized at the GHXcellence Awards. The 2024 awards have officially started receiving nominations, with the deadline set for Friday. This prestigious event, hosted by the Global Healthcare Exchange (GHX), celebrates innovation and excellence in healthcare. Located in Louisville, Colo., GHX is inviting submissions from professionals across the globe. This marks an exciting opportunity for companies and individuals to showcase their contributions to the healthcare sector. Nominations for potential honorees will be accepted until a specific date in December.

news.headline: Distributed Fiber Optic Sensor Market projected to reach $2,630.7 million by 2030, growing at 10.9% CAGR from 2024.
news.summary: A forecast predicts that the distributed fiber optic sensor market, which is currently valued at USD 1,411.7 million in 2024, is anticipated to see significant growth and reach a value of USD 2,630.7 million by 2030. This growth is expected to occur at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 10.9% between the years 2024 and 2030.

news.headline: Anti-Jamming Market to reach $9.9B revenue by 2031 with 8.60% CAGR: Verified Market Research®. Comprehen...
news.summary: Verified Market Research® recently released a detailed report on the "Anti-Jamming Market Size and Forecast," providing an in-depth analysis of the market. The report is considered comprehensive and authoritative, offering valuable insights into the market landscape. This research report covers important aspects such as market size, trends, and forecasts related to anti-jamming technologies. It delves into the competitive landscape and key players in the market, aiming to provide a thorough understanding of the industry. This report is a valuable resource for businesses looking to navigate and capitalize on the anti-jamming market, which is expected to grow significantly in the coming years.

news.headline: AudiencePoint unveils new Audience Engagement Suite in Chattanooga, aiming to revolutionize email marketing for enhanced revenue and engagement.
news.summary: In Chattanooga, Tennessee, on December 3, 2024, AudiencePoint, a prominent figure in email marketing evolution, has launched its latest Audience Engagement Suite. This innovative toolset is reshaping email marketing by boosting revenue generation and improving audience engagement.

news.headline: Edgecore introduces high-density 1/2.5/10GbE Fiber Switch with 100GbE uplinks from Taiwan; new product for faster networking.
news.summary: Edgecore recently unveiled a new high-density fiber switch capable of supporting 1/2.5/10GbE speeds, featuring 100GbE uplinks. The switch offers a significant increase in network capacity and efficiency, catering to the growing demand for faster data transfer rates. It is designed to accommodate heavy workloads and high data traffic, making it an ideal solution for organizations seeking to enhance their network performance. This announcement marks a significant advancement in networking technology, providing businesses with the capability to meet their evolving connectivity needs effectively.

news.headline: Raanan Horowitz appointed to Catalyze Partners' Advisory Board, bringing 30+ years of experience in scaling and innovation.
news.summary: Catalyze Partners, based in Dallas, has announced the appointment of Raanan Horowitz, former CEO of Elbit, to its Advisory Board. With over 30 years of experience in scaling and innovation, Horowitz will bring valuable expertise to the team.

news.headline: The Nation Network and Daily Faceoff launch The Sheet with Jeff Marek, expanding daily hockey coverage. Summary: New hockey show hosted by Jeff Marek launched on December 2, 2024. Marek is a renowned broadcaster with robust experience.
news.summary: In Toronto, The Nation Network ("TNN"), a prominent independent sports coverage destination within Better Collective's digital sports media group, unveiled the launch of The Sheet with Jeff Marek, a new daily hockey show hosted by renowned broadcaster Jeff Marek. The show debuted on December 2, 2024. Marek, a seasoned hockey media personality who joined The Nation Network in November, brings his vast experience and expertise to the program.

news.headline: Payments Innovation Alliance report explains cryptocurrency basics for digital payments. Important for transforming industry.
news.summary: In Reston, Virginia, Nacha's Payments Innovation Alliance, a membership program uniting various stakeholders worldwide aiming to revolutionize the payments sector, has released a guide titled Diving into the Fundamentals of Cryptocurrency as a Form of Digital Payment. This publication explains cryptocurrency’s definitions, process flows, and the involvement of participants. Cryptocurrency, a digital form of currency, enables online transactions through a blockchain.

news.headline: Report from CareQuest Institute for Oral Health emphasizes the importance of integrating oral and mental health during and after pregnancy for improved health outcomes.
news.summary: A recent report from CareQuest Institute for Oral Health in Boston has shed new light on the connection between pregnancy and oral and mental health. The report, released recently, offers valuable insights into the relationship between pregnancy and these two key areas of health.

news.headline: NVIDIA VP Marc Hamilton to keynote at Data Center World Global Conference on "Data Centers at Scale" in SF.
news.summary: A key figure in the technology industry, Marc Hamilton, Vice President of Solutions Architecture and Engineering at NVIDIA, is set to give a keynote speech at Data Center World. This conference focuses on data center IT infrastructure, facilities management, power designs, construction practices, and cutting-edge technologies for AI development. Hamilton's talk titled “Data Centers at Scale in the Age of Accelerated Computing” will provide insights on managing large-scale data centers in the current tech landscape. Attendees can expect valuable information from this event, which caters to professionals seeking to stay updated on industry trends and innovations.

news.headline: Bespoke Partners adds Lisa Rundlet Gordon as new CFO Partner, bringing 13 years of executive search experience.
news.summary: In San Diego, Bespoke Partners, a prominent executive search and leadership advisory firm catering to software companies, disclosed the addition of Lisa Rundlet Gordon as a Partner in its Chief Financial Officer (CFO) Practice. Lisa, with over 13 years of global executive search expertise concentrated on sectors like life sciences and technology, will bring her valuable experience to the team. Previously, she held a significant role in the Financial Officers Practice at Heidrick & Struggles.

news.headline: Zip is on Inc.'s 2024 Best in Business list in Financial Services, recognized for categories including SaaS and being under 4 years in business.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Zip, a prominent intake and procurement orchestration platform, has been honored by being featured on the Inc. 2024 Best in Business list. The recognition highlights Zip's success in various categories such as Financial Services, Software as a Service, Robust and Powerful, and On the Rise (0-4 years in business). Inc. presents the Best in Business Awards annually to acknowledge companies that have significantly influenced their sectors. This acknowledgment underscores Zip's standing as a leading player in its field and its impact on the market.

news.headline: Scope Labs in NYC appoints Dave Sukoff as Chief Strategy Officer for their new venture capital fund, Scope Labs Capital.
news.summary: A prestigious technology company in New York City, Scope Labs, has appointed industry veteran Dave Sukoff as its Chief Strategy Officer. Sukoff will lead Scope Labs Capital, the company's new venture capital division. This move signifies Scope Labs' comprehensive approach, integrating exceptional development talent, proprietary technologies, and capital to enhance the development of impactful market solutions.

news.headline: Enpro (NYSE: NPO) will present at Sidoti Dec Small Cap Conf on Dec 5, 2024 at 1:45 pm ET; webcast on their site.
news.summary: Enpro, a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol NPO, is scheduled to participate in the Sidoti December Small Cap Conference in Charlotte, North Carolina. The presentation will take place on Thursday, December 5, 2024, at 1:45 pm Eastern Time. For those unable to attend in person, a webcast of the event will be accessible through Enpro's official website.

news.headline: 68% of companies struggle to scale efficiently due to manual hiring processes. - Phenom High-Volume Hiring Analysis.
news.summary: In Philadelphia, recent findings from Phenom's High-Volume Hiring Analysis reveal that a significant 68% of companies still heavily depend on manual hiring processes. This reliance on traditional methods poses challenges to efficiently scaling their operations. The study underscores the need for organizations to adopt more streamlined and tech-driven approaches to hiring in order to enhance their recruitment processes.

news.headline: Samsung awards 300 U.S. schools as State Finalists in national STEM competition, each winning $2,500 prize package. National winners to receive $100,000 each.
news.summary: In Ridgefield Park, N.J., Samsung Electronics America recognized 300 public middle and high schools nationwide as State Finalists in the 15th annual Samsung Solve for Tomorrow competition. Schools from all 50 states were honored, each receiving a $2,500 Samsung technology prize package. This event celebrates achievements in STEM (Science, Technology, Engineering, and Mathematics) education. These State Finalists now have the chance to compete for the title of National Winner, with three schools standing to win $100,000 each for their educational initiatives.

news.headline: Portal-to-Bitcoin enhances Bitcoin's cross-chain DeFi using threshold signatures & atomic swaps, setting it apart from others.
news.summary: Portal-to-Bitcoin distinguishes itself from numerous cross-chain bridges by utilizing a unique blend of threshold signatures and atomic swaps in its system. By leveraging these two technologies, Portal-to-Bitcoin ensures secure and efficient transactions between different blockchains.

news.headline: Tom's Truck Center donates $300,000 to CNCDA Foundation on GivingTuesday to support automotive careers.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Tom's Truck Center has announced a significant contribution of $300,000 to the CNCDA Foundation in support of careers for automotive service technicians, as part of their GivingTuesday initiative. This donation aims to bolster opportunities in the industry and promote skill development for individuals pursuing such careers.

news.headline: PubMatic partners with Western Union for commerce media, offering access to diverse audience and premium inventory.
news.summary: PubMatic has expanded its supply-side platform (SSP) to cater to commerce media, providing advertisers with improved access to Western Union's diverse multicultural audience and premium inventory. This move aims to help advertisers reach a wider audience and access premium inventory through PubMatic's comprehensive SSP.

news.headline: US JOLTS Job Openings Actual 7.744M (Forecast 7.519M, Previous 7.443M)
Aspen Power accelerates renewable energy projects for completion in 2025, partnering with various entities, aiming for sustainable future.
news.summary: A distributed generation platform named Aspen Power based in New York has initiated a year-end campaign to expedite the progress of renewable energy projects set to be finished in 2025. The objective is to involve various collaborators such as solar developers, legal entities, financial institutions, EPC companies, property owners, and individuals engaged in solar portfolios at different phases of advancement and installation for commissioning. This strategic move is aimed at fostering the growth of the clean energy sector and creating opportunities for multiple stakeholders in the industry to contribute towards achieving this goal.

news.headline: Fratarcangeli Wealth Management ranked No. 22 on Forbes' Top Private Wealth Advisor list, highest in Michigan.
news.summary: Fratarcangeli Wealth Management (FWM), a wealth advisory firm specializing in high-net-worth clients, has achieved significant recognition in the financial industry. Based in Bloomfield Hills, Michigan, FWM has been ranked as the top advisor team in Michigan and the second-ranked advisor team in Florida by Forbes. This prestigious recognition was announced on December 3, 2024, solidifying FWM's position as a highly regarded financial institution. Forbes has placed FWM at No. 22 in their rankings, emphasizing the firm's success and expertise in managing wealth for affluent individuals.

news.headline: FirstEnergy's Mon Power and Potomac Edison finish winter prep to ensure reliable power for W.Va. customers. Tips offered.
news.summary: FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE: FE) electric companies Mon Power and Potomac Edison have finished inspections to prepare for increased electric use in the upcoming colder months. To help customers manage seasonal heating bills, the company is offering valuable tips. This initiative comes as forecasts predict a rise in energy consumption.
